title: Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup

seo.title: Authentic Mulligatawny Lentil Soup Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Craving a flavorful Indian soup? Try our authentic Mulligatawny Lentil Soup recipe! This spiced, hearty dish is easy to make at home. Get the full recipe now!
longTailKeywords: how to make Mulligatawny Lentil Soup
Mulligatawny Lentil Soup step by step
best Mulligatawny Lentil Soup at home
h2Headings: What is Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup?
Pro Tips for the Best Results
seo.imageAlt: A bowl of authentic Indian Mulligatawny Lentil Soup garnished with fresh cilantro and a lime wedge.
seo.imageCaption: Warm up with a bowl of this incredibly flavorful and authentic Mulligatawny Lentil Soup, a true taste of India.

description: Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup is a delightful Anglo-Indian creation, blending hearty lentils with a symphony of aromatic spices. This comforting and nourishing soup offers a unique balance of savory, tangy, and subtly sweet notes, perfect for a warming meal. Its rich texture and complex flavors make it a beloved dish across many kitchens.

instructions.title: Prepare Lentils and Aromatics
instructions.text: Rinse the red lentils thoroughly under cold water until the water runs clear. Drain well. Chop the onion finely, mince garlic, grate ginger, and slit the green chili if using. Prepare all other ingredients for easy cooking.

instructions.title: Sauté the Aromatics
instructions.text: Heat vegetable oil or ghee in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté until it becomes soft and translucent, about 5-7 minutes. Add the minced garlic, grated ginger, and green chili (if using), and cook for another 1-2 minutes until fragrant.

instructions.title: Toast Spices and Add Tomatoes
instructions.text: Reduce the heat to low. Add the curry powder, turmeric powder, cumin powder, and coriander powder to the pot. Sauté the spices for 30 seconds to 1 minute, stirring constantly, until aromatic. Be careful not to burn them. Stir in the diced tomatoes (with their juice) and the grated apple (if using). Cook for 2-3 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.

instructions.title: Simmer the Soup Base
instructions.text: Add the rinsed and drained red lentils to the pot, stirring to combine them with the spiced tomato mixture. Pour in the vegetable broth. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender and have broken down, thickening the soup.

instructions.title: Finish and Season
instructions.text: Once the lentils are cooked, stir in the coconut milk. Heat gently for a few minutes, but do not bring to a rolling boil after adding coconut milk. Remove the pot from the heat. Stir in the fresh lime juice. Season generously with salt and black pepper to taste. Adjust seasoning as needed.

instructions.title: Serve and Garnish
instructions.text: Ladle the hot Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup into bowls. Garnish each serving with a generous sprinkle of fresh chopped cilantro. Serve immediately with warm naan bread, rice, or crusty bread for a complete and satisfying meal.

tips: For a richer flavor, use homemade vegetable broth. A pinch of asafoetida (hing) added with the initial spices can enhance the digestive properties and flavor.
If you prefer a smoother soup, you can blend a portion of it with an immersion blender before adding the coconut milk, leaving some texture.
Mulligatawny soup tastes even better the next day as the flavors deepen. Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 days.
article: Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup is a beloved Indian Soups and Stews dish enjoyed across Indian. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
